variable.name: auth_token
variable.description: Paste the token returned by Login here.

info.name: JussiLog API Documentation
info.description: REST API documentation for Jussilog endpoints.

item.name: Regenerate thumbnail images for products and/or resumes.

query.description: Which model to process: products, resumes, or all (default).

item.name: Delete all thumbnail images for products and/or resumes (originals are kept).

query.description: Which model to purge: products, resumes, or all (default).

item.name: Regenerate thumbnails for a single product.
Purge thumbnails for a single product.
Regenerate thumbnails for a single resume.
Purge thumbnails for a single resume.
Get the authenticated user with metadata.
Login or register using Google ID token.
Show a single published blog post (public).
List all blog posts for admin (including hidden).

variable.description: The ID of the blog category.
The ID of the blog category.

item.name: Update a user's role by identifier (id, username or email).

response.body: Hello world from Laravel! This is a test route to check if the API is working.

item.name: List invoices for the authenticated user.

query.description: Filter by status (draft, issued, paid, cancelled).
Sort field (id, invoice_number, subtotal, total, status, issued_at, paid_at, created_at).

request.description: Returns a paginated list of invoices belonging to the currently authenticated user.

item.name: Return available invoice statuses and item types with translated labels.

query.description: Language code (en, fi). Defaults to en.

item.name: Export a preview invoice as PDF (no auth, no database save).

request.description: Builds a transient invoice from the request body and returns it as a downloadable PDF.

item.name: Export a preview invoice as HTML (no auth, no database save).

request.description: Builds a transient invoice from the request body and returns it as an HTML file.

item.name: Send a preview invoice by email (no auth, no database save).

request.description:
Builds a transient invoice from the request body and sends it to `to_email`.
If `to_email` is omitted, falls back to `customer_email` in the payload.
Sends the invoice as a PDF attachment to the customer email or to a specific email address if provided.

response.body: {"message": "The email field must be a valid email address.", "errors": {}}
response.name: Validation error

query.description: Filter by status (draft, issued, paid, cancelled).
Sort field (id, invoice_number, subtotal, total, status, issued_at, paid_at, created_at).

request.description: Returns a paginated list of invoices. Results can be filtered by order, user and status.
Returns a single invoice with its items, associated order and user.
Returns a PDF file of the invoice.

item.name: Download a stored invoice as HTML.

request.description: Creates a new invoice for the given order and automatically generates invoice items from the order's line items.

response.name: Validation error

request.description: Updates an existing invoice. Automatically sets `issued_at` when status changes to `issued`, and `paid_at` when status changes to `paid`.

response.name: Validation error

request.description: Permanently deletes an invoice and all its associated items.

item.name: Display a listing of orders for the authenticated user.

formdata.description: The id of an existing record in the users table.
Optional custom ID.
Product title.
Product description.
Price.
Sale price.
tax_rate is a snapshot; if omitted but tax_code is given, resolve from TaxRateController. Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 1.
Quantity in stock.
Visibility flag.
The id of an existing record in the users table.
Product title.
Product description.
Price.
Sale price.
tax_rate is a snapshot; if omitted but tax_code is given, resolve from TaxRateController. Must be at least 0. Must not be greater than 1.
Quantity in stock.
Visibility flag.
Delete featured image.
Image paths to delete.

item.name: List all items in a resume section.
Add an item to a resume section.
Update an item in a resume section.
Delete an item from a resume section.
Return available themes, templates, and languages for PDF/HTML export.

request.description: Pass `?lang=fi` to receive translated labels (default: `en`).

item.name: Export a resume as a PDF from a JSON payload (no stored resume required).

request.description:
The photo can be supplied as a base64-encoded string in `photo`.
The result is identical to the authenticated export but nothing is written to the database.

item.name: Export a resume as an HTML file from a JSON payload (no stored resume required).

request.description: The photo can be supplied as a base64-encoded string in `photo`.

query.description: Username of the resume owner (required for public access).
Resume access code (required when the resume has one).

request.description:
Accessible either with a valid Sanctum token (returns the authenticated
user's primary resume) or without a token by supplying `owner` (username)
query parameter; if the resume has a code set, `code` must also match.

item.name: Get the main (primary) resume for public display.

query.description: Access code (required when the resume has one).

request.description:
The resume must be set to public (`is_public = true`).
Supports two lookup modes:
- By resume ID (`?id=<n>`)
- By owner username (`?owner=<username>`)

If the resume has a code set, the `code` query parameter must match.

item.name: Display a specific public resume (no token required).

query.description: Access code (required when the resume has one).

request.description:
The resume must be set to public (`is_public = true`).
If the resume has a code set, the `code` query parameter must match.

item.name: Display all resumes for the authenticated user.

query.description: Number of results per page (1-100). Defaults to 10.
Field to sort by (id, title, created_at, updated_at). Defaults to updated_at.
Sort direction (asc, desc). Defaults to desc.

item.name: Create a new resume with all sections in one request.
Display a specific resume with all its sections.
Update a resume and sync provided sections.

formdata.description: Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 50 characters.
Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
max 5MB.
Must not be greater than 100 characters.

item.name: Update a resume and sync provided sections.

formdata.description: Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must be a valid email address. Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must not be greater than 50 characters.
Must not be greater than 255 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
Must be a valid URL. Must not be greater than 500 characters.
max 5MB.
Must not be greater than 100 characters.

item.name: Delete a resume and all its sections.
Export a resume as a PDF file.
Export a resume as an HTML file.
Export a resume as a downloadable JSON backup file.

request.description: The photo is not included. All section items are exported without internal IDs.

item.name: Import a resume from a previously exported JSON backup file.

request.description: Creates a new resume for the authenticated user. The photo is not restored.

item.name: Import a resume from a previously exported JSON backup file.

request.description: Creates a new resume for the authenticated user. The photo is not restored.

item.name: Return the list of supported languages with translated labels.

request.description: Pass `?lang=fi` to receive labels in Finnish (default: `en`).

item.name: Return the list of world countries with translated labels.

request.description: Pass `?lang=fi` to receive labels in Finnish (default: `en`).

item.name: Return a single country by its ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

request.description: Pass `?lang=fi` to receive the label in Finnish (default: `en`).

item.name: Return all available tax rates with translated country names.

query.description: Language code for country name translation (en, fi). Defaults to en.

item.name: Return the tax rate for a specific country code.

query.description: Language code for country name translation (en, fi). Defaults to en.

request.description:
Admins can delete any user. A regular user can only delete their own account
and must confirm with their current password (not required for OAuth-only accounts).

item.name: Count unique visitors of all time.
